yesterdayStoryline.headline: Spain silence France to reach the final
yesterdayStoryline.subtitle: Oyarzabal penalty and Porro strike secure a 2-0 semi-final win in Dallas

todayStoryline.headline: England meet Argentina in Atlanta
todayStoryline.subtitle: High-stakes semi at Mercedes‑Benz Stadium; winner advances to the World Cup final

lines: Spain controlled possession and smothered France with calm midfield dominance.
The victory sends Spain into the final and leaves France heading to the third-place game.

today.weather: 29°C · partly sunny · low chance of showers.

facts.home: Geoff Hurst remains the only player to score a World Cup final hat-trick, 1966.
facts.away: Argentina won their first World Cup at home in 1978, beating Netherlands 3-1.

news.headline: China Q2 growth slows, misses forecasts
news.body: Official data showed China’s economy grew about 4.3% year-on-year in the second quarter, below market expectations. Economists said weaker domestic demand and global trade shocks could prompt targeted stimulus.

footerNote: All times converted from official kickoffs
